nav.aboutMetaDesc: Meet the visionaries behind Marga Adventure. Founded by Buddhiman Tamang, we blend 16 years of adventure expertise with deep psychological insight to create transformative journeys.
nav.contactMetaDesc: Start your journey with Marga Adventure. Contact our experts in Kathmandu to plan your bespoke Himalayan experience. We are here to guide your path.
nav.trekkingMetaDesc: Walk the ridges of the Himalayas. Our trekking packages take you deep into the heart of the mountains, combining physical challenge with cultural immersion.
nav.trekkingDescription: Walk the ancient ridges where the mountains embrace the sky and stone paths tell stories of a thousand years. Here, the journey is measured not in miles, but in the warmth of shared smiles and the hiss of steam from a village tea hearth. Blend the thrill of the ascent with the deep peace of temple chants. In Nepal, every step draws you closer to the clouds, and every encounter brings you closer to home.
nav.spiritualMetaDesc: Awaken your spirit in the birthplace of peace. From Lumbini to high-altitude monasteries, our spiritual retreats offer a path to inner silence.
nav.spiritualDescription: Nepal is the sanctuary where the spirit finds its rest. From the sacred birth-hush of Lumbini to the meditative silence of high-altitude monasteries, every breath is a conscious act of peace. Immerse yourself in the rhythmic chanting of monks and the profound stillness of the peaks. This is not just a retreat; it is a soulful journey to rediscover your inner light amidst the clouds.
nav.wildlifeMetaDesc: Encounter the wild side of Nepal. Home to Bengal Tigers, One-Horned Rhinos, and elusive Snow Leopards, our wildlife tours bring you face-to-face with nature's majesty.
nav.wildlifeDescription: Venture into the untamed heart of Nepal, where dense jungles and grassy plains teem with exotic life. Beyond the high peaks lies a world of roaring Bengal Tigers, grazing One-Horned Rhinos, and playful herds of wild elephants. Our wildlife experiences take you deep into protected national parks, offering a chance to witness nature's drama unfold in its purest form. From canoe rides on crocodile-infested rivers to silent jungle walks, discover a biodiversity hotspot that rivals any in Asia.
nav.photographyMetaDesc: Capture the light of the Himalayas. Designed for photographers, these trips chase the golden hour over Everest and the shadows of ancient temples.
nav.photographyDescription: Nepal is a living masterpiece painted in amber dawn and indigo shadow. Frame the fiery light igniting the peaks and the mist-shrouded temples where time stands still. From the haunting gaze of a Sadhu to the raw power of a Bengal tiger, every shutter click captures a story of resilience. This is a visual pilgrimage into the soul of the Himalayas.
nav.nepalMetaDesc: Discover Nepal, the Himalayan Kingdom. From the heights of Everest to the jungles of Chitwan, explore a land of infinite diversity and spiritual depth with Marga Adventure.
nav.communityMetaDesc: Marga Adventure is dedicated to giving back. Discover our 'Sharing Warmth' initiative and how every journey contributes to the local communities of Nepal.
nav.blogMetaDesc: Read stories of adventure, philosophy, and connection from Marga Adventure. Deep dives into the culture of Nepal, Bhutan, and Tibet.
nav.wildlifeBirdingMetaDesc: Spot the rare avian wonders of Nepal. With over 850 species, including the Spiny Babbler, our birdwatching tours are a paradise for naturalists.

bhutanContent.title: Bhutan
bhutanContent.description: Discover the land of the Thunder Dragon, where Happiness is the only currency. In this ancient Kingdom, let your true self be free and Feel the weightless peace of the Tiger’s Nest monastery and witness vibrant,swirling festivals in a land where nature and spirit exist in a perfect, silent embrace.
bhutanContent.architecturalMarvelsText: Stand before the grand gates of Punakha Dzong, where administrative prowess meets monastic peace.
bhutanContent.livingHeritageText: Experience the timeless traditions of daily life, from archery tournaments to the weaving of intricate textiles.
bhutanContent.sacredArtsText: Witness the devotion in every brushstroke of Thangka paintings and the craft of traditional furniture.

tibetContent.title: Tibet
tibetContent.mainTitle: The Roof of the World
tibetContent.description: Journey to Tibet, where ancient spirituality meets the clouds. Marvel at the majestic Potala Palace in Lhasa, circle the sacred Mount Kailash, and gaze upon the north face of Everest. With its turquoise lakes and high-altitude plateaus, Tibet offers a profound landscape steeped in mystery and deep Buddhist tradition.
tibetContent.mountKailashText: Circle the sacred Mount Kailash, a pilgrimage site for Buddhists and Hindus.
tibetContent.nomadicSpiritText: Encounter the resilient culture of the high-altitude nomads and their yak caravans.
tibetContent.deepDevotionText: Immerse yourself in a land where every step is a pilgrimage and every breath is a prayer.
tibetContent.seasonNote: End of spring, summer and autumn offer the best blue light season for photography and travel in Tibet.

home.metaDesc: Welcome to Marga Adventure. An exclusive gateway to the Himalayas, offering premium trekking, spiritual retreats, and cultural experiences in Nepal, Bhutan, and Tibet.
home.heroAlt: Mount Everest and Buddhist Chorten Landscape in Nepal
home.taglineHeading: Find your way home to yourself
home.taglineBody: {{brand}} is not only an adventure company, it is a sanctuary for souls in the heart of the Himalayas. We craft unforgettable Treks, Cultural Immersions, Spiritual Retreats and Wildlife Encounters that bridge the gap between the world around you and the world within. We believe that travel is not just about reaching a destination; it is about who you become along the way. At {{brand}}, we don't just guide your steps; we guide your experience.
home.taglineCta: Follow the Marga to customize your journey.
home.featuredTripTitle: Inner Journey to the Heart of the Nepalese Himalayas
home.featuredTripDesc: A 14-day conscious immersion blending movement, meditation, nervous system regulation, and Human Design amidst the world's highest peaks.
home.featuredTrip2Title: Bisket Jatra Festival & Nepalese New Year
home.featuredTrip2Desc: A spectacular 15-day immersion into the heart of the Nepalese New Year in Bhaktapur, combining mystical fervor, explosions of color, and wild safaris in Bardia.
home.featuredTrip3Desc: A photographer's paradise combining the splendor of the Himalayas at dawn, a wild safari in Chitwan, and the intensity of the Shivaratri and Loshar festivals.
home.mappingBody: Explore the sacred geography of Nepal. From the bone-chilling winds of high Himalayan passes to the velvet humidity of the Terai jungles, this land is a living fusion of spirit and earth. Here, crimson Hindu rituals and golden Buddhist traditions weave together in the fabric of daily life. We don't just guide your steps, we chart paths that lead beyond the physical.
home.mapAlt: Interactive Map of Nepal Trekking Regions by Marga Adventure
home.spiritualDesc: Spirituality is the quiet conversation between your true self and the universe. It is a profound stillness that transcends religious dogmas. Nepal is a sanctuary where the peaks of the Himalayas meet ancient wisdom. Marga Adventure carves the route to self through these monumental experiences.
home.photographyDesc: Chase the shifting light where earth meets heaven. From the fluttering dance of prayer flags to the ringing silence of the snow-crowned giants, We invite you to frame stories etched in stone and spirit.
home.wildlifeDesc: Wander where the jungle breathes. Feel the vibration of the tiger’s prowl in golden grassland and watch the armored rhino emerge from the silver morning mist. This is a true Marga(path) into the heart of the wild. Every rustle reveals a new, untamed story.
home.trekkingDesc: Traverse ancient trails where the majesty of the Himalayas meets deep-rooted traditions. Trekking here is a physical prayer. Marga Adventure would walk along with you in every encounter with vivid mani walls and the soft hum of remote monasteries.
home.testimonial1Text: “Having traveled for over 30 years and worked with many guides, I can confidently say Buddhiman is the best guide and reassuring companion. He is organized, punctual, knowledgeable about Nepal, and a reassuring guide with genuine values. Flexible, attentive, discreet, and responsive, Budddhiman ensures the most wonderful adventures. Trust his agency to make your Nepalese dreams a reality.”
home.testimonial1Role: France, Publisher and Editor-in-Chief Le Temps d’un Voyage
home.testimonial2Text: “Buddhimnan is an exceptional, long-time acquaintance. He is serious, professional, attentive, and speaks perfect French, simplifying communication during our Nepal trips. Cultured and passionate, he cheerfully and kindly shares his country's beauty. His extensive skills allow him to guide us on both mountain treks and sightseeing tours. I highly recommend him; he will make you love Nepal and ensure an unforgettable trip.”
home.testimonial3Text: “Since 2014, Buddhiman Tamang has provided exceptional trekking experiences to me and my groups in Nepal. A warm, competent, and multilingual tour leader (French and English), he expertly tailors trips to client wishes. Highly recommended for his efficiency and positive spirit, Buddhiman ensures every journey through Nepal’s stunning regions is professional and truly unforgettable.”
home.founderQuote: "The right path doesn't just lead to a summit, it leads you back to yourself."

about.findingYourPath: Finding Your Path in the Himalayas
about.margaMeans: In Sanskrit and Nepali, the word "Marga" means "The Path" or "The Way."
about.margaPhilosophy: At {{brand}}, we believe that travel is more than just moving from one place to another; it is about finding the right path—one that leads to discovery, connection, and peace of mind. With decades of experience working with thousands of clients, we can definitely help you with your own discovery.
about.founderBio1: His journey began in 2008, working at the grassroots level as an assistant trekking guide before rising to become a senior tour leader. Over the course of 16 years, Buddhiman has navigated the varied terrains of Nepal, mastering the logistics of high-altitude trekking and the nuances of cross-cultural hospitality.
about.founderBio2: What sets Buddhiman apart is his dual academic background. He holds a {{masters1}} as well as a {{masters2}}. This unique educational foundation allows him to curate experiences that are not only operationally seamless but also deeply attentive to group dynamics and the psychological well-being of his guests.
about.founderQuote: In 2025, Buddhiman channeled his nearly two decades of experience into founding his own company {{brand}} with vision to offer travel experiences that go beyond sightseeing and trekking - blending professional safety standards with a deep understanding of the transformative power of travel. Ultimately, Buddhiman's mission is to ensure that every client returns home not just with photos, but with a renewed perspective on the world and their place within it.
about.teamTagline: The experts, guides, and visionaries dedicated to your safe and transformative journey.
about.pillar1Body: We tread lightly on the sacred earth. Our journeys are designed to leave footprints of respect, not scars, honoring the Himalayas.
about.pillar2Body: We are one sangha. We empower local hands and hearts, ensuring that every step of your journey uplifts the villages we call home.
about.pillar3Body: Your safety is our vow. Led by local experts who know every stone and storm, we clear the way so you can focus on the inner journey.
about.binodNote: Grand Raid des Pyrenees & Everest Marathon
about.pierreNote:
Editor & Editor-in-Chief of Le Temps d'un Voyage
Tel: 0638938831

community.heroSubtitle: We believe that tourism should leave a footprint of kindness, not just boots in the snow.
community.braveheartsQuote: Nepal is not just a destination to us; it is our home. We are dedicated to ensuring that the beauty of the Himalayas and culture is preserved for future generations and that the communities who host us benefit directly from your visit.
community.braveheartsDesc1: is a non-profit organization founded in the aftermath of the 2015 earthquake. Their mission is to build knowledgeable and socially empowered communities where local people drive their own transformation.
community.braveheartsDesc2: We stand with their vision of creating self-reliant communities through decentralized and inclusive development. By choosing Marga, you support their vital work in education, child welfare, and community empowerment across the nation.
community.card1Body: Creating vibrant spaces like the Shree Nepal National Secondary School library where curiosity takes flight.
community.card2Body: Ensuring every child has the right to play. Building safe playgrounds that echo with laughter and happiness.
community.card3Body: "Babuko Asha" means "Father's Hope". We partner with local schools to honor heritage while building a modern future.

blog.heroSubtitle: Stories of path, purpose, and people.
blog.joinCircleBody: Receive stories from the Himalayas, early access to retreat dates, and notes on mindful living directly to your inbox.
blog.post1Title: Why We Left the Guidebook Behind

nepal.heroSubtitle: Where the earth touches the sky.
nepal.diversityBody: A land of infinite diversity where the air itself tasted of incense and ozone. The eternal spirituality in the environment grounds the soul. In the shadow of Everest, the atmosphere feels like prayer. Wander the cluttered, timeless alleys of Kathmandu where history lingers in the shadows, feel the wild, beating heart of the jungle in Chitwan, and find your center in the sacred silence of Lumbini. This is not just a journey across the land, but a pilgrimage into the depths of wonder.
nepal.act1Desc: Walk the ancient ridges where the mountains embrace the sky and stone paths tell stories of a thousand years. Here, the journey is measured not in miles, but in the warmth of shared smiles and the steam of tea by a village hearth.
nepal.act2Desc: Nepal is a sanctuary where the spirit finds its home. From the sacred birth of peace in Lumbini to the meditative silence of high-altitude monasteries, every breath here feels like a prayer.
nepal.act3Desc: Embark on a birdwatching journey through Nepal, a hidden sanctuary boasting over 900 avian species. From the tropical wetlands of Koshi Tappu to the alpine forests of the Annapurna region.
nepal.act4Desc: Nepal is a living masterpiece painted in light and shadow. Frame the golden dawn igniting the himalayan peaks and the ancient, mist-shrouded temples where time stands still.

activity.readyBody: Our experts are ready to craft a personalized itinerary just for you, tailored to your pace and preferences.

notFound.label: 404 Error
notFound.heading: Are You {{highlight}}?
notFound.body: Even in the wildest mountains, every path leads somewhere. It seems you've wandered off the trail, but finding your way back is part of the journey.

thankYou.heading: Thank You
thankYou.body: Your message has been received. Our team is already looking into it and will get back to you shortly to help plan your Himalayan journey.
